examples: His voice had sunk to a conspiratorial whisper.
'I know you understand,' he said and gave a conspiratorial wink.
There's an extra secretive, conspiratorial thrill to goofing off on a day when most people are at work.

There are a few explanations for this mixed messaging, many of them quite conspiratorial.
